scripts.auth:dev: npx prisma generate --schema=apps/auth-service/prisma/schema.prisma && nest start --watch auth-service
scripts.auth:migrate: dotenv -e apps/auth-service/.env -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema=apps/auth-service/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.cart:dev: npx prisma generate --schema=apps/cart-service/prisma/schema.prisma && nest start --watch cart-service
scripts.cart:migrate: dotenv -e apps/cart-service/.env -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema=apps/cart-service/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.wishlist:dev: npx prisma generate --schema=apps/wishlist-service/prisma/schema.prisma && nest start --watch wishlist-service
scripts.wishlist:migrate: dotenv -e apps/wishlist-service/.env -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema=apps/wishlist-service/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.query:dev: cd apps/product-query-service && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npx nodemon
scripts.query:migrate: dotenv -e apps/product-query-service/.env -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema=apps/product-query-service/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:generate: npx prisma generate --schema=apps/auth-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=apps/cart-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=apps/wishlist-service/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=apps/product-query-service/prisma/schema.prisma
